title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability · Gate Defense
summary: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a risk-based lint policy and fixtures. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Start with maintained recommended rules and promote material findings to errors.
Enable rules for invalid control flow, unsafe APIs, promises, hooks, and accessibility as applicable.
Set severity from failure impact and confidence rather than preference strength.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Use a changed quiz case for gates lint correctness that tests this competency: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.

content.text: Use a changed quiz case for gates lint correctness that tests this competency: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Fault-isolation decision
content.text: Select evidence that identifies a cause, not a patch that only hides the Lint Upgrades symptom in a risk-based lint policy and fixtures during this quiz case.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: Clang AddressSanitizer and UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer — Controls native-code runtime sanitizer purpose, build profiles, output, limitations, and security cautions.

hints: Name the Lint Upgrades precondition or invariant that the quiz case must preserve.

Trace this concrete case before choosing: Use a changed quiz case for gates lint correctness that tests this competency: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: Linter upgrades are behavior-free dependency bumps.

stimulus.title: Lint Upgrades failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Linter upgrades are behavior-free dependency bumps.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.

options.text: Accept the Lint Upgrades result because visible a risk-based lint policy and fixtures output is the highest authority. This does not resolve diagnose the hidden failure.

For diagnose the hidden failure, apply Lint Upgrades without its stated preconditions, omit the a risk-based lint policy and fixtures trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Lint Upgrades for a risk-based lint policy and fixtures.
Run the Lint Upgrades boundary case for a risk-based lint policy and fixtures, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Recommended Baseline evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Recommended Baseline assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Lint Upgrades: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed quiz case for gates lint correctness that tests this competency: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Lint Upgrades through the concrete a risk-based lint policy and fixtures case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.
